## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New source adapter
- [ ] Scoring/ranking change

## Testing

- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests for my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -x`)
- [ ] I have updated golden fixtures if scoring/ranking changed
- [ ] I have added contract tests if LLM schemas changed

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (Ruff, mypy clean)
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have not modified protected files without approval
- [ ] I have tested with `techwatch --help` locally
